title: 人混みなんて問題じゃないわ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: King Halo and I are out together, when...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's that crowd of people up to?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, could it be this? The aquarium's billboard
says they're going to be introducing a new baby
seal.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It must be a fairly rare event to have attracted so
many people.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Oh, no, I don't think so...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: A king doesn't mingle with a crowd! Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Urk! W-well, of course I don't! It's so difficult to
move around, and, you know... um...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's so crowded that we won't be able to see
anything even if we got inside anyway!
choice_data_list:
In that case, we can weave our way through the
crowd.

In that case, we just have to push our way
through.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Weave our way through?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, you mean we need to plot a course through
this sea of people. That's not a bad idea.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, that and a king never backs down from a
challenge! Let's give it a try!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ah! The crowd is trying to carry us away! Stay on
your toes, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! We made it all the way through without
being caught up in the crowd!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
How about that! No one can keep up with my
speed!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, why did we come to the aquarium again?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo was so focused on getting to the front
of the crowd that she completely missed seeing
the baby seal.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Push our way through?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I suppose I can't run away from all of my
problems... and I would hate being seen doing so.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I must persevere and open a way forward with my
majestic presence, even if I get caught in the
middle of everyone!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Very well, Trainer! Let's part the crowd and force
our way through!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
A-all right... The baby seal is right on the other
side of that group...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Here I go! Let the grand spectacle of me marching
bravely forth be forever emblazoned in your
memory!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Um, excuse me! C-could I possibly slip by here?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Nnngh! It's so cramped! I'm being crushed! But I
won't give up!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... I somehow managed... to see the seal...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I didn't realize I was willing to work this hard just
to see a baby animal...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the stress of the crowd, King Halo pushes
on and achieves her goal.
